title: Show "e-mail and activity summary/badge" on item
excerpt: Today, an item shows if there is an update, or a preview of the checklist in an update of the item. If the “email and activity” integration is used, I believe it is equally important to show that there are actions in the…

posts.author: Trobriand (Jimmy)
posts.cookedHtml: Today, an item shows if there is an update, or a preview of the checklist in an update of the item. If the “email and activity” integration is used, I believe it is equally important to show that there are actions in the item.

posts.author: AHB (Angela )
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed–anything that happens in the emails & activities tab needs to show as an update.
